dashboard.title: Institution Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeMessage: Welcome to the Kiini main dashboard - a system for managing institutions, departments, and staff.

institution.title: Institution Profile
institution.description: View and manage your institution details

businesses_section.title: Institution Businesses
businesses_section.none: No businesses in this institution yet

departments.title: Department Management
departments.description: Create, edit, and delete departments within your institution.

staff.title: Staff Members
staff.description: View and manage staff information for the institution.

tiers.title: Institution Tiers
tiers.description: List of available tiers for institutions such as Small, Medium, Large.

types.title: Institution Types
types.description: View or select institution type such as private company, NGO, or government institution.

institution_storefront.empty: No shop has registered here yet.
